name: Fiddlehead Puff
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F.
2. Butter a 1 1/2 L casserole dish.
3. In a large bowl, beat the Bisquick baking mix, milk, eggs, and salt until smooth.
4. Stir in the fiddleheads and shredded cheddar cheese.
5. Pour the mixture into the prepared casserole dish.
6. Bake for about 1 hour, or until a knife inserted between the center and edge comes out clean. Turn off the oven when done.
